name: generate_image
description: Generate an image via Gemini or OpenAI. Text-to-image or reference-conditioned.

output.description: Path to the generated image file

params.name: aspect-ratio
params.description: Gemini only. E.g. '9:16', '1:1'. Ignored by OpenAI.

params.name: model
params.description: Override the connector's default model for the chosen provider
